--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[FinTech_FraudDetection] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (FinTech_AuthVault) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[FinTech_LedgerService] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (FinTech_FraudDetection).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[FinTech_TransactionQueue] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (FinTech_TransactionQueue) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[FinTech_TransactionQueue] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (FinTech_PaymentGateway).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (FinTech_PaymentGateway), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (FinTech_TransactionQueue) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (FinTech_AuthVault). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (FinTech_PaymentGateway) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (FinTech_LedgerService) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[FinTech_PaymentGateway] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (FinTech_TransactionQueue) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这套金融科技系统设计一个架构图，核心是四个按层级递进的风控服务模块。最底层叫FinTech_FraudDetection，作为整个风控链路的入口。
明白，FraudDetection作为入口节点。那它的上层模块是什么？我需要确认层级关系。
第二层是FinTech_LedgerService，它直接依赖FraudDetection的检测结果。然后第三层是FinTech_TransactionQueue，承接LedgerService的业务逻辑。
好的，我已添加FinTech_LedgerService和FinTech_TransactionQueue，并建立了从FraudDetection到LedgerService、再到TransactionQueue的依赖链。
等等，TransactionQueue需要再细分一下。它实际上有两个实例：一个是常规的业务队列，另一个是更高级别的风控队列。我们暂时都叫FinTech_TransactionQueue，但要在注释里区分。
两个同名节点？这会不会造成混淆？我需要确认这是同一个服务在不同场景下的复用，还是确实有两个独立部署。
是同一个服务组件，但在架构中承担两个不同层级的职责。一个处理LedgerService过来的常规交易，另一个处理更复杂的聚合风控逻辑。用同一个名称，通过上下文区分。
已调整，现在有两个FinTech_TransactionQueue节点，分别位于第三层和第四层。第四层还需要补充什么？
第四层最顶端是FinTech_PaymentGateway，它是整个风控链路的最终出口，对接外部支付渠道。它从第二个TransactionQueue接收指令。
已添加FinTech_PaymentGateway，并建立从第二个TransactionQueue到PaymentGateway的连线。现在主干是四层：FraudDetection → LedgerService → TransactionQueue → TransactionQueue → PaymentGateway。
主干对了，但还缺一个旁路模块。FinTech_AuthVault需要作为认证服务嵌入，它跟FraudDetection和PaymentGateway都有交互，但不在主链上。
AuthVault是独立节点，同时连接FraudDetection和PaymentGateway？还是只作为被调用的服务？我需要明确它的位置。
AuthVault是独立节点，但在当前视图中主要体现为被FraudDetection和PaymentGateway引用的认证能力，不画独立连线，用点击回调展示它的关联关系。
了解了，我会在FraudDetection和PaymentGateway的详细说明中引用AuthVault。另外，我注意到LedgerService也需要在说明里提到PaymentGateway的关联。
还有一个关键设计：我们需要一个Players Guide子图，里面放一个FinTech_PaymentGateway的特殊实例，叫conditional_curse，它代表条件触发式的风控策略。
conditional_curse是PaymentGateway的别名还是独立节点？子图里的节点和主图的PaymentGateway是什么关系？
是同一个FinTech_PaymentGateway组件，但在Players Guide子图中展示它的条件触发特性。conditional_curse是它在策略层面的表现形式。
已创建Players Guide子图，并在其中添加conditional_curse节点，标注为FinTech_PaymentGateway。现在需要建立子图与主图的连接吗？
需要。从LedgerService到conditional_curse画一条线，表示业务层可以触发条件风控策略。这是整个架构的灵活控制点。
已添加LedgerService到conditional_curse的连接。现在检查各节点的回调详情：FraudDetection需要描述为Tiny Damnation，LedgerService是Imprecation，第一个TransactionQueue是Malediction。
对，层级递进关系要体现在描述里。第二个TransactionQueue是Scourge，PaymentGateway在主干上是最终出口，在子图里是Conditional Curse。
Scourge的描述里需要提到AuthVault和PaymentGateway的交互，以及LedgerService的关联。Malediction要引用TransactionQueue自身，对吗？
没错。Scourge作为最高级别风控，要体现它与AuthVault的认证交互、与PaymentGateway的支付拦截、与LedgerService的账务回滚。Malediction的自引用表示队列的自我调节机制。

所有回调详情已配置完成。最后确认一下：主干四层FraudDetection-Tiny Damnation、LedgerService-Imprecation、TransactionQueue-Malediction、TransactionQueue-Scourge、PaymentGateway；子图conditional_curse为Conditional Curse，与LedgerService相连。
等等，我注意到一个错误。Scourge的描述里提到"facial hair or eye color"这个例子，它应该关联到LedgerService，不是随意放置的。还有，PaymentGateway在Scourge里的引用要准确。
已修正。Scourge描述中的facial hair or eye color示例现在正确关联到FinTech_LedgerService，PaymentGateway的引用也已校准。还有其他需要调整的吗？
检查通过。最后确认Conditional Curse的描述完整性：它要体现delayed trigger、positive intent、reflexive action to end the conditional bless这些关键机制，以及Calibration的时间边界。
全部完成。架构图已包含：四层主干风控链、AuthVault嵌入引用、Players Guide条件策略子图，所有节点回调详述了能力成本、触发条件和系统交互。主题已设为dark模式。
